subject: Re:
body:
sylvia.. I remember telling you that that people that fail , always have many reasons why something didn't happen, people that succeed  , make things happen,, I am disappointed that to date I've heard,, 1. my boyfriend, 2 my dvd, 3  my driving licence,4  my doctor says six months between operations,5 I may have some options for money 6. i can't go in and out on my visa 7 ive been very busy with promotions .8  my passport has been lost 9 I have no money. .. you are no further ahead today than you were 2 months ago..  you are too special to let this continue. 


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, April 9, 2007 7:58:51 AM
Subject: FW:


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: sylvia geersen [mailto:sylvia300985@hotmail.com] 
Sent: Saturday, March 31, 2007 7:33 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: 


Hai Lesley how are you doing?
Im oke i want to tel Jeffrey somting 
Hai Jeffrey how are you?
Hope you`re oke i have the feeling you mis understude me about the conversation
 
 
I speak today whit you jeffrey and i was in the train and the connection was not so good and every body knows me here in holland so i didn`t  explain good what was happend.
I told you i went to the dokter (dokter luiendijk) for controlle, and the dokter say come back 29th to see a specialist (dokter laban) hows working as a dokter for more than 20 years,so i went there and he told me whats wrong whit my breast,also he was really shokt about it because he say you are so nice and this is bad i wanne help you so i told him about dokter baker,and he say i send you the pictures befor  operation and after and you send it to dokter baker .he didn`t send it yet i was waiting for the pictures but i think he send it monday and than i send it to dokter baker.
He also told me that if i make a operation i need to wait until end may begin june because otherwise its bad for your health  you always need to wait 6 months after surgery to do new operation. He say dokter baker will say the same to you its to soon to do it now .So i send monday the pictures to dokter baker and than i come to newyork end of april  training training working and than the operation. Thank you so much for helping me if i every can do something back for you let me know !
I learn so much from you i really lissen to you what you say to me about gym and everything ,so happy that i mad you
Please give me a call because i was not sure if you understand me goog today and i toth a little bit that you hang up the phone for me i was not sure if it was that ore the connection.
Kisses sylvia xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
